t_en: All-you-can-enjoy jokes for you.
Whatever, I can't care less!
I hate toilet humor the most.
That's totally normal.
This is a cold-hearted Porcelain Jar Killer...
Its lack of mercy is truly jarring.
Terrible pun. Zero points. Next!
I can cough in nine different languages.
That's not impressive.
I can doze off using ten different expressions.
This can't go on, I just can't stop!
My face is cramping from laughing so much.
Cheers, be les miserable!
To... the improv-ing clown.
If you don't laugh, I'll—
You really are something else...
All you think about is other people.

t_ch: 这是我吃过最拉的拉面。
t_en: These are the "noodlest" noodles I've ever tried...
Yeah, keep eating. That'll show you.
Listen, it's just...
Pfft, hahahahaha!
Haha? Hahahahaha.
Sorry. Guess I'm not funny enough...
No. No. You were just TOO funny.
We're all on the same team, no need to be formal.
This world shouldn't be like this...
Are you trying to destroy the tavern?
Move aside, I need to use the bathroom.
But you're literally on the toilet right now.
Your shuffling speed needs work!
Lock in for <unbreak>100</unbreak> days!
Hope to see you in the big leagues soon!
My daughter is missing, have you seen...
Let's have a game of Cosmicon Collective first!
No one in the tavern can beat me!
It's okay if your thesis isn't great.
C's get degrees.

t_ch: 宝贝这厕所好像跳楼机。
t_en: Baby~ This toilet is like a rollercoaster.

t_ch: 让我蹲下又站起，头很晕。
t_en: It spins my head right round, baby, right round...
The extra sickness will be spread to everyone who sees it.
If it's not something rare, I don't want it.
I see... I get it.
I'm not a regular giraffe, I'm a cool giraffe.
When exactly am I supposed to laugh?

t_ch: 不知道，我真的不知道啊！
t_en: I don't know, I really don't know!
I am a chest.
I am a chest.
I am a chest.
I am a chest.
I am a chest.

t_ch: 老大，我做噩梦了，梦到自己作业没写，被海龙老师骂了。
t_en: Boss, I had a nightmare where I didn't do my homework and got scolded by Professor Seadrake.

t_ch: 真是可怕的噩梦，阿雀。可我们是两只鸟，不用像人类与幻造们一样上学上班。
t_en: What a terrible nightmare, Aquill. But hey, we're birds, which means we don't have to go to school or work as humans and imagenae do.

t_ch: 太好了老大，我们去鸽川吃薯条吧。
t_en: That's great, boss! Shall we go grab some fries at Dovebrook then?
Huh? You got two new pens?

t_ch: 不，这是我绘制的幻造种，让它帮我完成期末作业，可它也懒，自己又画了只新的笔。
t_en: No, this is an imagenae I created to help me with my final assignment, but it's lazy too. You see, it went and drew itself a new pen.

t_ch: 我懂了…所以你的期末作业完成了吗？
t_en: I see... so have you finished your final assignment?

t_ch: 还没，因为我要先照顾好这十三支笔，三块颜料盘，一本「幻造绘画入门」和一台照相机。
t_en: Not yet, I need to take care of these thirteen pens, three paint palettes, a book named Introduction to Imagenesis Art, and a camera first.

t_ch: 啵啵娃老师长得好可爱哦！我都要爱上她了——
t_en: Ms. Dollie is so cute! I think I'm falling for her...

t_ch: 要知道，对那些不良学生，啵啵娃老师可是很凶的！
t_en: You know, Ms. Dollie can be really tough on delinquent students!

t_ch: 想象一下，不管你打开哪间教室的门，最后都会来到啵啵娃老师的办公室，她就在教室正中央一脸微笑的看着你……
t_en: Imagine this: No matter which classroom door you open, you'll end up in Ms. Dollie's office, with her sitting right in the middle, smiling at you...

t_ch: 那不是更可爱了吗？我这就去故意惹老师生气！
t_en: Isn't that even cuter? I'm gonna go make Ms. Dollie angry on purpose!

t_ch: 既然你不同意我的批评，你就给我分析一下这幅画到底好在哪？
t_en: Since you don't agree with my criticism, why don't you tell me what's so great about this painting?

t_ch: 那你可要听好了，幻造技艺里有这么两个派系
t_en: Well then, listen up, there are two factions in the art of imagenesis:

t_ch: 一是抽象派，很有韵味，却没人知道画的是什么。
t_en: First, there's the abstract style, which is super artsy, but nobody has a clue what it's supposed to be.

t_ch: 二是极简派，草草几笔，却能让人一目了然。
t_en: Second is the minimalist style. With just a few strokes, everything becomes crystal clear at a glance.

t_ch: 而这就是极简抽象派，既没有信息，也没人知道画的是什么，艺术发展至此，实属优秀。
t_en: And this is what minimalist abstraction is about: No information, and nobody knows what's being painted, truly the pinnacle of artistic evolution.

t_ch: 哎，刚好你们两个在，看看这地板都脏成什么样了，去拿个拖把帮忙拖一下吧。
t_en: Oh hey, since you two are here, just look at how filthy this floor is. Go grab a mop and help clean it up, would you?

t_ch: 偷偷跟你说，泰科老师好像谈恋爱了！
t_en: Just between us, I think Mr. Tyker is seeing someone!
For real? Who's the other person?

t_ch: 你敢信，是那个凶神恶煞的欧克老师！而且听说，她最近形象都大变样，变得温柔动人了。
t_en: You probably won't believe this, but it's that terrifying orch teacher! They say she's had a total makeover lately and turned into a real sweetheart!

t_ch: 啊~我知道这件事！泰科老师的课太催眠，治好了她的失眠症。黑眼圈一消，自然就温柔起来了。
t_en: Ah~ I know about this! Mr. Tyker's lectures were so boring they cured her insomnia. Once those dark circles under her eyes disappeared, she naturally became more gentle.

t_ch: 真是天造地设的一对，祝他们幸福。
t_en: They're a match made in heaven. I wish them all the happiness.

t_ch: 呀！吓死我了，偷听八卦就算了，倒是别出声啊！
t_en: Yikes! You scared the life out of me! Eavesdrop all you want, but don't make any noise!

t_ch: 受害人遇害的时间是下午三点，所以每个人可以报一下自己的不在场证明。
t_en: The victim was killed at 3 PM. In this case, everyone should present their alibis.

t_ch: 我跟她们在操场看埃勒里打篮球，每个人都可以互相作证。
t_en: We were at the playground watching Ellery play basketball. We can vouch for each other.

t_ch: 我在打篮球，她们可以作证。
t_en: I was playing basketball. They can vouch for me.

t_ch: 那么，真相已经水落石出了！唯一没有不在场证明的我，就是凶手！
t_en: So, the truth has finally come to light! I'm the only one without an alibi, which means I'm the killer!
...Huh?

t_ch: 哥，我觉得你不太适合玩剧本杀……
t_en: Bro, I don't think murder mystery games are really your thing...

t_ch: 我要代表我们社团，参加下个月的校运会，最近要抓紧练习！
t_en: I'll be representing our club in next month's School Sports Day, so I need to step up my practice!

t_ch: 要加油啊…不对，你不是回家社吗？
t_en: Keep at it... Wait, aren't you in the Go-Home Club?

t_ch: 没错，所以接下来一个月我就不来学校了，有空来我家玩哦！
t_en: That's right, so I won't be coming to school for the next month. Feel free to drop by my place if you're free!

t_ch: 我问你，你觉得幻月游戏的意义，真的是收集愿力谒见阿哈吗？
t_en: Let me ask you this: Do you really think the Phantasmoon Games is just about gathering Wishpower to meet Aha?

t_ch: 想想历届幻月游戏，谒者遇袭事件，被遗忘的某届获胜者，还有上一次……
t_en: Think about all those past Phantasmoon Games, the Supplicant assault, that forgotten champion, and the last time...

t_ch: 想太多了，阿哈乐得没边，发生什么祂都笑得开心。就算公司出资另有图谋，那又如何？
t_en: You're overthinking it. Aha's just a happy-go-lucky soul who finds joy in everything. Even if the IPC has some ulterior motive for funding this, so what?
Well... you've got a point there.

t_ch: 运动会一点都不公平！机铠能一口气做一千个俯卧撑，我们轻脚吃盖饭举个碗都要累得够呛，凭什么一起参赛？
t_en: The sports meet is totally unfair! A mechatron can do a thousand push-ups without breaking a sweat, while we lightpaws get exhausted just lifting a bowl of rice. How is that a fair competition!?

t_ch: 不，绘世学院开设体育课和运动会，主要是为了增进同学们的感情。
t_en: No, Graphia Academy offers PE classes and sports events mainly to strengthen the bonds between students.

t_ch: 机铠又没法通过锻炼增加体能，进行攀比也毫无意义。
t_en: We mechatrons cannot build stamina through exercise, so it's pointless to compete anyway.

t_ch: 可比赛结果关系到社团经费啊！不管了，我这就去找学校投诉，以后掰手腕比赛你不准参加。
t_en: But the competition results affect our club's funding! Well, I'm filing a complaint with the school. You're banned from all future arm wrestling competitions.

t_ch: 这位隐身的幽灵同学，这样容易撞到人，很危险的。
t_en: Hey there, invisible ghost buddy! Running around like that is dangerous. You might bump into someone!

t_ch: 校规第二百三十条有写，幽灵幻造种在校内不得将透明度降低至<unbreak>20%</unbreak>以下的同时进行实体化。要遵守校规啊，同学。
t_en: According to School Rule no. <unbreak>230</unbreak>, ghost imagenae students are not allowed to materialize while maintaining transparency below <unbreak>20%</unbreak> on campus. You must follow the school rules, dear student.

t_ch: 老师，我不是幽灵，我是隐形人。
t_en: Professor, I'm not a ghost. I'm just invisible.

t_ch: 原来如此，是老师误会了，那走路的时候当心点——
t_en: Oh, I see, I misunderstood. Well then, watch your step—

t_ch: ——不对，只有幽灵才能让衣服跟着透明化！你校服呢？你现在不会什么都没穿吧！赶紧去更衣室！
t_en: ...Wait, only ghosts can turn their clothes invisible! Where's your school uniform? Don't tell me you're not wearing anything right now! Get to the locker room, quick!

t_ch: 我数数，二、四、六…十三碗？你吃了十三碗？我的乐子神啊。
t_en: Let me count... two, four, six... thirteen bowls? You ate THIRTEEN bowls? By The Laughter!

t_ch: 嗯？这么大惊小怪干嘛，咱们又不是第一天认识了。
t_en: Huh? What's with all the fuss? It's not like we just met yesterday.

t_ch: 你平常至少也得吃二十碗！我知道你考试失利没食欲，但是不填饱肚子，身体是会出问题的。
t_en: You usually eat at least twenty bowls! I know you've lost your appetite after failing the exam, but not eating enough will take a toll on your health.

t_ch: 总之你等我下，我再去给你加几盘菜……
t_en: Anyway, just wait here, I'll go get you a few more dishes...
Alright, alright.
I don't have much of an appetite today...

t_ch: 怎么了，一个人呆在这种地方？
t_en: What's up? Why are you hanging out here all on your own?
I'm... trying to calm down.

t_ch: 让我猜猜…失恋？投资失败？被帮派威胁了？
t_en: Let me guess... Heartbreak? Failed investment? Got threatened by a gang?

t_ch: 不是，但也没差…我直播间被封了。
t_en: Not exactly, but close enough... My livestream got banned.

t_ch: 啊…乐子神在上，这真是太可怕了……
t_en: Oh... by The Laughter, this is absolutely mortifying...

t_ch: …不论如何，振作起来。这里是鸽川，直播爆点要多少有多少。从头开始吧，总会有办法的。
t_en: ...Anyway, chin up. This is Dovebrook, and there's no shortage of hot streaming content here. Let's start from scratch. We'll figure something out.

t_ch: 谢谢…你是不是正在直播？
t_en: Thanks... Are you livestreaming right now?

t_ch: 你发现啦？「街边心灵鸡汤」直播间，欢迎关注！
t_en: You noticed? Welcome to the "Streetside Therapist" livestream! Please subscribe!

t_ch: 我们哥俩又让人家给开除了，已经是三个月来第五次了。
t_en: The two of us got fired again... That's the fifth time in three months.

t_ch: 对啊！你之前讲得很好听嘛，脱离帮派就能有正经收入……
t_en: Yeah! You made it sound so good before, saying I'd get legitimate income once I left the gang...

t_ch: 我…我真的已经尽力了，要不您二位在自己身上找找原因？
t_en: I... I really did my best. Maybe the problem lies with you two?

t_ch: 啊？我们自己身上找原因？我们真的已经改邪归正了！甚至正得发邪！
t_en: Are you serious? Our problem? We've completely turned over a new leaf! We're practically saints now! So saintly, it's a crime!

t_ch: 对啊！我们现在不但不惹是生非，还维护社会治安哩！
t_en: Exactly! Not only are we staying out of trouble now, we're even helping maintain law and order!

t_ch: 昨天帮公司发传单的时候，我们哥俩顺手教训了三个小混混，还把一个骚扰路人的醉鬼给扔进了鸽川！
t_en: Yeah, so yesterday, my buddy and I were handing out leaflets for the IPC and ended up smacking some sense into three thugs, then dumped some drunk hassling people right into the Dovebrook!

t_ch: 对啊！我们根本想不到有什么开除我们的原因！
t_en: Right!? We can't think of any reason why they'd kick us out!
And that's why!

t_ch: 欢迎光临！呀，这不是三当家吗？最近有什么好「生意」吗？
t_en: Welcome! Oh, if it isn't the Third-in-Command? Got any good "business" going on lately?

t_ch: 你好，夫人。很不巧，最近风声紧，兄弟们只能做一些风险小的生意。
t_en: A pleasure, ma'am. Unfortunately, things are a bit tight lately. My crew and I are stuck with low-risk gigs for now.

t_ch: 那正好，我向您推荐新款的麻袋，可以装下满满的纸钞，无论扛在肩上跑还是放在卡车上运都不会松动。
t_en: Perfect timing. Allow me to present our latest line of gunny sacks. They're designed for high-capacity cash, and stay sealed whether you're running with them on your shoulder or hauling them in a truck.

t_ch: 太好了，先给我五个，真不好意思，每次都麻烦您。
t_en: Great. I'll take five for now. I'm really sorry to keep bothering you like this.

t_ch: 不会不会，您是治安局派来的卧底这事可绝对不能暴露呀！以后也请多多关照我们家生意呀！
t_en: No trouble at all. We absolutely can't let it slip that you're actually an undercover agent from the Security Bureau! We do hope to see you again soon.

t_ch: 我说您…不要每次都把我的真实身份大声完整复述一遍啊！
t_en: Listen, would you please stop reciting my real identity out loud every single time!?
Just looking at the route map gives me a headache.
Passenger, do you need a doctor?
Uh, that's not what I meant.
What he needs is navigation software.
You wanna go eat crepes together later?
Sure thing~
With a side of bubble tea?
Huh? So you really want to gain weight?
Hey. This is a public space.
So what?
...Let's talk about this when your parents get back.
My life is over.
...Alright, see you when you respawn.
Y—You're not even gonna comfort me a little?
You've been "over" three times already today.
Still playing this game, huh?
I'm not like you, always chasing the new big thing.
It's called protecting your eyesight, capeesh?
Take the Bullet Wyrm for two stops first...
Transfer and then transfer again...
Finally got it, let's roll!
I love you like I love life itself...
Same here!
...just like I love beef noodles!
Same here!
Please maintain order and proceed in an orderly fashion!

t_ch: 不然列车长会发脾气哦。
t_en: Otherwise the conductor will get cranky.
For real?
...I can't stand you Fluffy fans.
The Astral Express is so magnificent!
Tell me this isn't a hallucination...
I'd love to clock in here every single day!
It's a pretty spot-on recreation—
This isn't a model!

t_ch: 我是土生土长的本地魂。
t_en: I'm a true local ghost, born and raised.
Pleased to meet you.
How does it know what I like?

t_ch: 你的想法都写在脸上了。
t_en: It's written all over your face.
Where is my password...!

t_ch: 是不是锁在置物柜里了？
t_en: Is it locked in the Storage Cabinet?
Gotta work hard at my job today as well!
Full speed ahead to the IPC!
Nobody knows the grind better than you!
You're the best!
You're the ultimate office champ!
Gotta work hard at studying today as well!
You're the best student ever!
You look absolutely beautiful when you're studying!
You've totally got this!
You're the best student around!
Gotta work hard even when there's nothing to do!
Be the chillest person ever!
Living that chill life!
I wanna be as chill as you are!
You sure know how to live it up!
Excuse me, how do I get to this exhibit...
Should I take you like I did yesterday?

t_ch: 每天都要排这么久的队…
t_en: Every day I gotta wait in such a long line...
So what are you waiting for? Buy your ticket already!
Now it's my turn to drag my feet.
We can't just let this slide!
C'mon, let it go. Life's hard for everyone...
Mostly 'cause I'm worried you're not gonna win this one...
Even though we're stopping at so many stations...
But it's never absent and never late!
The Bullet Wyrm is always so punctual!

t_ch: 列车晚点可不算我迟到…
t_en: Hey, if the Express is late, that doesn't count as me being late...
Bullet Wyrms are never late!
We're finally meeting IRL... Babe, where are you?
Look down, your babe is right here.
Do we really have to do the deal through a Storage Cabinet?
The ways of our ancestors must not be abandoned!
Have you listened to that song?
Yeah, I totally did! It was awesome!

t_ch: 感谢支持我的街头演出！
t_en: Thanks for supporting my street performance!
Hi! Nice to meet you! Marry me!
Give it up, young lady...
There's no... turning back for me now.
There are teachers looking for you everywhere out there...

t_ch: 这场逃课闹剧该结束了。
t_en: This little truancy stunt ends now.
The Phantasmoon Games this time...
It's entertainment value is off the charts.
Could you lay off the Sparxie videos for a bit...
And give me some attention?
Wanna come check out Sparxie too?
Watch me do this permadeath run!
How'd you lose your last life?
What are you doing down underneath in the manhole cover?
You guys really live in the sewers?
I'm a lightpaw, not a cat...
And it's just a design!
Grant me strength!
Who are you talking to?
This system's such a pain to use...
Hey, I designed this!
No wonder it's so hard to use...
Everyone, please support my new single!
Buy 'em! Buy five thousand of 'em!
Collect six thousand singles and get a signed photo~
Why are there ghosts?

t_ch: 因为这些糕点…好吃死了！
t_en: Because these pastries... are to die for!
Wanna try our new latest drink in the café?
Is this the same coffee as Himekat's~
That's not a selling point!
Have you read the latest chapter?
Blurry_QR_Colt!
My psycho patients.
Meow~ That's what makes it cute~

t_ch: 可咱平时会这么说话吗？
t_en: But do we really talk like that?
Dummy, that's for humans to hear!
Half-price sale!
Buy our bread and get phone data for free!
Buy mobile data and get free bread too~
This is so pretty, fam!

t_ch: 好好学习，长大了当主播！
t_en: Study hard, and when you grow up, you can be a streamer!
But I wanna be an astronaut...
Thanks for coming, darlings!
Oh!
Love you all, my little darlings!
Bob's the best!
What's all the ruckus about?
Now THIS is real music!
Our goal is—
—No cavities!
Hey, you're mixing up your lines!
Oh yeah, yeah, yeah — never stopping!
Hear it, identify it, download it!
The power of science is amazing.
Quick, get over there for a group photo!
So you're an Electric type plus Ghost type?
I... I just got stuck, that's all...
Hahahahahahaha!
Uh... what're you so happy about?
Watching a livestream of a plant growing.
Its follower count's growing faster than mine.
Near-expiry goods, <unbreak>90%</unbreak> off store-wide.

t_ch: 爸，你都喊了一年临期了…
t_en: Dad, you've been saying they're "nearing expiration" for a whole year now...
So... everything's expired, store-wide clearance sale?
Do you have Punklordian Ice Cream?
Of course, at the very bottom.
Stop rummaging through me!
I heard they got a new producer?
Shame, I was really looking forward to beating them up!
I heard you can pray for romance here...
How old are you, and you still believe in these things?
I wanna...
Don't say it! If you say it out loud, it won't come true!

t_ch: 这家老诊所还是倒闭了…
t_en: So this old clinic went under after all...

t_ch: 谁能打过公司流水线呢？
t_en: Who can beat the IPC assembly line?

t_ch: 可我的假牙还没做好呢…
t_en: But my dentures aren't ready yet...
Extra Strong Pier Point Coffee~
This reeks of wealth, I just know it~
...There's no accident here...
Just one imagenae...
Recreating the crime scene.
Say it — who's the number one idol!?
It's you, it's you!
It's Lady Sparxie, you idiot!

t_ch: 限售新品已经停止售卖~
t_en: This limited-time item is no longer available~

t_ch: 再加点钱也不是不可以~
t_en: Though a little extra cash may just make it happen~
This game company is toast!
Don't even go there.
This place is terrible...
Even the scalpers have stock, but I don't!
Wanna know why he's a scalper?

t_ch: 老大…还是没有原谅我吗…
t_en: Dude... he still hasn't forgiven me, huh...

t_ch: 谁让你把他的薯片吃了？
t_en: Who told you to eat his chips?
I'll buy him another one, alright?
That's a Sparxie limited edition!
Had one too many, huh? Take care of yourself!
Another round? Come on, bottoms up!
Skewers~ If they ain't tasty, they're free!
They're terrible, give it to me.
You haven't eaten yet...
The lady boss here is so cool!

t_ch: 为了她，我连续来半个月了！
t_en: I've been coming here every day for half a month just for her!
Unlimited free drinks for a hundred credits!

t_ch: 我的记录是连喝一百杯。
t_en: My record's a hundred cups in a row.
I... I feel awful...
So I'll just head to the tavern by myself then?
No... I can still drink!
Every place has its own unique flavor!
Aren't they all pre-made recipes?
The love of cats comes in a thousand forms!
I'm hers!
She's mine!
Stop, I don't want either of you.
Thanks for helping me out~
Looking forward to working with you!
That depends on your performance.
This place is packed!
If it's crowded, you know it's good!

t_ch: 这就是火花花来过的店？
t_en: So this is the shop Sparxicle visited?
Why's this thing so beat-up and ratty?
Sparxicle really is something else!
I've only been in line for five system hours~
Next time, let's find somewhere way more poppin'!
Welcome. Please, sit wherever you like.
Wanna check out what's on the menu?
Welcome!
So mechatrons need to eat too?
A phone's iron, food's steel — gotta eat!
It's your turn to treat us today, no?
Once I get my paycheck, drinks are on me!
You say that every time!
Mommy, I want a new model~
When you earn some money, remember to buy one for mom!
I want to buy comics, not appliances!
Comics are on the third floor~
The whole building used to be full of them...
Everything's on sale for only 5 credits...
...or above!
I'm not stopping until I eat at this place!

t_ch: 否则我没办法安心离去…
t_en: Otherwise, I won't be able to leave in peace...
Let's see what everyone...

t_ch: 对幻月游戏奖品的看法。
t_en: Thinks about the Phantasmoon Games prizes.
Wait, isn't this a movie set?
Nah, it's from a game.
Maybe I should just call in sick today...
Don't always be thinking about skipping class.
Calling in sick and skipping class are two completely different things!
When I get rich...
I'll buy out all the ice creams!
Can you be just slightly more ambitious? Please?

t_ch: 可恶，看到情侣我就生气！
t_en: Ugh, I get so mad whenever I see couples!
What's that supposed to mean?

t_ch: 我希望只有我们俩幸福！
t_en: I want us to be the only ones who are happy!

t_ch: 你不知道，我年轻时候啊…
t_en: Would you believe that, when I was young...
Cut it out. We're the same age.
That cartoon was god-tier work...
How are they supposed to make a sequel now?
Don't I look just like Sparxie!
...Goodbye. I don't know you.
So many people on the streets...
Let's use Interplanar Jump to get over there!
Whoa, hold on... I just ate. Don't make me puke on the painting.
Ever tripped over a wispae?
Yeah, they're more dangerous than a banana peel.
I've only been in line for five system hours~
Next time, let's find somewhere way more poppin'!
Piping hot meatballs~
Boss, gimme two boxes!
Let's just get four boxes!
Where should we go today?
Wanna come over and game together?
Sweet! Let's go right after school!
This lag is killing me. Can you play properly or what?

t_ch: 是啊，连我给你刷的礼物…
t_en: Yeah, even the gifts I sent you...
Are missing a few zeroes!
This sucks. There's nothing new to eat.

t_ch: 这就是美食博主的悲哀…
t_en: This is the tragedy of being a food influencer...
I wanna make it big overnight.
I've got an idea for you...
Pay me two thousand for the consultation first.
Phantasmoon Games is here.
None of your business.
Let's go eat barbecued meat tonight!

t_ch: 算了吧，那家店油不好喝…
t_en: Nah, pass. Their oil tastes nasty...
A three-hour commute to work is so exhausting...
It might not be a walk in the park, but...
Walking more in the park? That's even more exhausting.
I'm getting too old for all this liquor...
Don't even start. You always fill it halfway.
Who's up for a round of Cosmicon Collective?
I'm in!
Could it be... the "Baby God of War"?
I wanna eat sweetfin waffles!
I wanna eat meatballs!
Then we'll have one of each!
We'll have one serving of each, boss!
There you go again, mooching off my business!
He's here for the meatballs!
Here it comes! I'm about to drop some jokes on ya!
Ugh, come on! Not the bad puns!
How about a cup of Boom Boom Furbo Tea?
Kopi Luwak flavor refers to...
Just not a furbo.
Can't have your carbs and your six-pack too!
Imagenae can, hehe.
The Laughter! Pick me!
O Laughter! I don't wanna get cut!
Welcome! Right this way!
Find a spot by the window.
The big city... Is so big!
If you're not good at giving compliments, you don't have to force it.
Tourists, watch out for scam artists!
Learn from my mistakes!
Please split the bill.
No no. I've got a membership card~
This plaza would be way better if I designed it...
Come on, haven't you been a second party long enough?
You're not from around here, are you?
But I don't got no accent...
Fifty years ago, things weren't this gaudy...
Times have changed, boss!
Ploos get <unbreak>30%</unbreak> off in-store!
What if I shout "I love ploos" three times?
Thanks for being a fan, full price for you.
Show your rank and get <unbreak>70%</unbreak> off!
In competitive gaming, being bad is the ultimate sin...
Lady Sparxie's streaming spot!
No pictures or check-ins without ordering first.
I'm not going back until I see Sparxie!
We charge by the hour here.
Come follow this over<unbreak>-70</unbreak> streamer~
Turn off the beauty filter if you dare!
My life's been through some serious ups and downs...
Three major discounts? Where???
Who's the best Elation pathstrider?
It's me, it's me, it's totally me!
My head's itching like crazy.

t_ch: 那可能是你要长脑子了。
t_en: That might be a sign you're growing a brain.
...I didn't quite catch that. Is that a good thing?
How many packs of sugar?
Is there a difference?
The guilt's not the same!
Your bubble tea, five hundred credits.
I hate paying out of pocket for team building.
Just quit the IPC and then...
Might as well start streaming from here!
I can't win this argument, so...
Let's have a game of Cosmicon Collective!
Nope, not happening.

t_ch: 为啥你不愿嘎嘎叫呢嘎？
t_en: Why won't you quack, quack?
I'm going through puberty.
Guess who?
Holy cow, they're all brand new parts!
It's too hard to guess... Is it my bro?
Delivery guy here. Got a package for you.

t_ch: 猫也想参加幻月游戏喵。
t_en: Kitty wants to join the Phantasmoon Games too, meow.
But those kitty paws are just too adorable...
...can't grip the controller, fudge.
Join the Phantasmoon Games?

t_ch: 也没规定外地人不行啊！
t_en: Hey, there's no rule saying outsiders can't do it!

t_en: Wait, the tech here is that smart?
Wait, you're an imagenae! Never mind!
Too bad, I've already memorized it.

t_ch: 嗯嗯，网上已经吵起来啦…
t_en: Yup yup, it's already blowing up online...

Dude, you're in my way.
We're all pals here, no worries.
Let's split up.

t_ch: 就必须从我身上跨过去！
t_en: Over my dead body!

"Commencing lifting of left leg."

t_ch: 隔壁薯片半价，快去买啊！
t_en: The chips next door are half off, hurry up and grab some!

t_ch: 我一定是被公司做局了。
t_en: The IPC definitely set me up.
Oww—
Hey, watch where you're going, will ya?
Ow ow ow...
Watch out when going around a corner next time!

Let's just get four boxes!

What's he saying?
Hello? Can you hear me?
Loud and clear!

t_ch: …我从绘世学院毕业，拒了异常防御部的offer，加入珠星财团，你觉得是为什么？
t_en: ...I graduated from Graphia Academy, turned down an offer from the Department of Aberration Defense to join Pearluxe Corp instead. Why do you think I did all that?
You want to drive a mechatron around?

t_ch: 我想！我想开*大*机铠！享受「乐子神在上，地上的人都和尘灵一样」的快感！
t_en: I do! I wanna pilot a massive mechatron! I want that rush of looking down and thinking, "The Laughter above, everyone down there looks just like wispae!"

t_ch: 好，这么喜欢，想必你应该知道成为驾驶员的必备条件。
t_en: Good. Since you're such a fan, I assume you know the requirements for becoming a pilot.

t_ch: 先成为整备士，参加三年在岗培训，参加一年一度的驾驶员选拔，从数万竞争者里脱颖而出为前十。
t_en: First, become a mechanic. Then, undergo three years of on-the-job training. Finally, join the annual pilot selection and rise above all the other tens of thousands of applicants to secure a spot in the top ten.

t_ch: 然后再来算笔账——聘用机械整备师，支付驱动愿力、购买年度机铠商业保险，买月眠专用辅助座椅…这些个人账单就占了薪水的<unbreak>80%</unbreak>，还有……
t_en: And then let's crunch the numbers... Hiring a mechanic, paying for kinetic Wishpower, buying annual commercial insurance for the mechatron, purchasing a specialized moonlull support chair... These personal bills alone eat up <unbreak>80%</unbreak> of my paycheck, and that's not even counting...
Hello? Are you listening?
...Ma'am, this is a job search site.
